parsedJson.summary: The site shows real roofing credentials and project imagery, but the layout feels dated, cluttered, and slow to guide a Brisbane roofing customer toward calling.

issues.title: Phone action is not clear on mobile
issues.what_observed: On the mobile screenshot, the phone number appears as a large blue glossy graphic reading “1300 4 DIAMOND” under the QBCC text, with no plain “Call now” button visible.
issues.why_problem: A Google-searching roofing customer on their phone wants the fastest path to call. A decorative number graphic looks like an image or banner, so some visitors may not realize they can act immediately.
issues.what_correct_looks_like: A fixed or above-the-fold mobile call button with plain text such as “Call 1300 4 DIAMOND”, high contrast, 44px+ tap height, and a secondary “Request quote” button.
issues.how_to_fix_in_redesign: Replace the glossy phone-number image with a real tappable call button in the mobile header and add a second quote button directly below the hero/service message.
issues.plain_explanation: 手机页面上电话看起来像一张蓝色广告图，不像一个可以直接点击的按钮。
issues.customer_impact: 很多本地找屋顶维修的人是在手机上搜索的，如果他们不能马上点电话，常常会回到 Google 结果页找下一家公司。访客通常会在几秒内决定要不要联系。

issues.title: Mobile first screen is all badges
issues.what_observed: The mobile screenshot shows the logo, HIA badge, five large orange stars, four award medals, QBCC text, and phone graphic before any service message or quote prompt.
issues.why_problem: Trust badges help, but here they take over the whole first screen. A visitor looking for roof restoration or repair has to work harder to confirm they are in the right place.
issues.what_correct_looks_like: Mobile first screen should show business name, one trust line, a short service promise for Brisbane roof tiling/restoration, one phone button, and one quote button.
issues.how_to_fix_in_redesign: Condense the mobile header: keep the logo smaller, show one combined rating/credential row, then place a clear headline and call/quote buttons before the badges.
issues.plain_explanation: 手机打开后先看到一堆星星和奖章，但看不到清楚的服务说明和报价入口。
issues.customer_impact: 客户不是来研究奖章的，他们想知道“这家公司能不能修我的屋顶、怎么联系”。首屏信息不清楚，会让一部分潜在客户直接离开。

issues.title: Desktop hero lacks a clear offer
issues.what_observed: On desktop, the main content area begins with a carousel photo of The Tingalpa Hotel roof, while there is no large headline, service list, Brisbane location message, or quote button beside it.
issues.why_problem: A local-search visitor may not know whether this business handles their exact roofing need at a glance. The project photo proves past work, but it does not tell the visitor what to do next.
issues.what_correct_looks_like: A hero section with a headline such as “Roof Tiling & Roof Restoration in Brisbane”, 2-3 service bullets, a visible phone button, and a quote request button.
issues.how_to_fix_in_redesign: Turn the carousel area into a conversion hero: left side service promise and CTAs, right side one strong roof project image with a short caption.
issues.plain_explanation: 电脑页面最重要的位置放了案例照片，但没有清楚告诉客户你做什么、在哪做、下一步怎么联系。
issues.customer_impact: 本地客户会同时打开几家公司的网站，谁能最快讲清楚服务和联系方式，谁更容易拿到电话咨询。

issues.title: Glossy graphics feel old
issues.what_observed: The desktop header uses a black background, blue outlined logo, glossy blue phone-number badge, bevelled active Home tab, and multiple shiny award medallions across the top.
issues.why_problem: The design looks like an older website, which can make visitors wonder whether the business is still actively maintained, even if the company itself is reputable.
issues.what_correct_looks_like: A flatter header with a crisp logo, one accent blue, clean white or dark background, restrained trust badges, and modern buttons without bevels or heavy outlines.
issues.how_to_fix_in_redesign: Rebuild the header using flat colors, simplified spacing, real text for phone/QBCC details, and a single compact trust strip instead of glossy badge graphics.
issues.plain_explanation: 页面的发光字、渐变按钮和奖章堆叠让网站看起来像很多年前做的。
issues.customer_impact: 屋顶工程金额不小，客户会用网站外观判断公司是否专业可靠。网站显旧会降低信任感，尤其是第一次从 Google 进来的客户。

issues.title: Navigation is hard to scan
issues.what_observed: The desktop navigation uses small italic grey labels on black, with a bright blue Home box while other items like “Roofing Services” and “News and Updates” are subdued.
issues.why_problem: The service page link is less visually obvious than the Home tab, so visitors may miss where to find the exact roofing service they need.
issues.what_correct_looks_like: Navigation should use clear non-italic labels, strong contrast, and service-first ordering such as Services, Roof Restoration, Roof Repairs, Projects, Reviews, Contact.
issues.how_to_fix_in_redesign: Replace the current nav with a simple high-contrast menu and make the primary actions “Call” and “Get Quote” visible on every screen size.
issues.plain_explanation: 菜单字小、斜体、颜色灰，最重要的服务入口不够显眼。
issues.customer_impact: 如果客户找不到自己需要的服务，他们不会花时间研究网站，通常会返回搜索结果点击竞争对手。

issues.title: Trust signals are cluttered
issues.what_observed: On the desktop screenshot, Ridgebond, Spraychief, Jetwave, Milwaukee, TrueLocal, and Industrial Roof Coatings logos appear scattered down the right side beside the project photo.
issues.why_problem: There are many trust-related logos, but they compete with each other and do not clearly explain why the visitor should trust this roofer.
issues.what_correct_looks_like: A structured trust section with 3-4 clear items: QBCC licence, HIA member, star rating/reviews, years serving Brisbane, each with short supporting text.
issues.how_to_fix_in_redesign: Move supplier and partner logos lower on the page, then create a clean trust bar near the top with only the strongest customer-facing proof points.
issues.plain_explanation: 右侧放了很多品牌和认证图片，但没有整理成客户容易理解的信任理由。
issues.customer_impact: 信任信息太乱时，客户不会逐个研究，反而可能觉得页面像广告墙。清楚的执照、评价和本地经验更能促成咨询。

issues.title: Project image needs clearer context
issues.what_observed: The large desktop carousel photo shows The Tingalpa Hotel with a small “roof restored by Diamond Roof Tiling & Restoration” overlay near the bottom-right.
issues.why_problem: The real project image is useful, but the small overlay does not quickly explain what was done, where it was done, or why it matters to a homeowner.
issues.what_correct_looks_like: Project imagery should include a readable caption such as “Tingalpa roof restoration, Brisbane” plus a short result line like “tile restoration and coating”.
issues.how_to_fix_in_redesign: Use fewer, stronger project photos with larger captions showing suburb, service type, and outcome; add a link to view recent Brisbane roofing projects.
issues.plain_explanation: 案例照片是真实的，这是好事，但说明文字太小，客户不容易看出这个案例证明了什么。
issues.customer_impact: 客户想知道你有没有做过类似屋顶和附近地区的项目。案例说明越清楚，越容易让他们放心询价。

positive_observations: Business name and roofing category are immediately visible in the logo.
QBCC licence and HIA membership are shown above the fold.
Real completed roof/project imagery is present and should be kept.
redesign_priorities: 1. Add a clear mobile-first call button and quote button above the fold.
2. Replace the badge-heavy header with a focused Brisbane roofing hero message.
3. Reorganize trust signals into a simple licence, reviews, membership, and local-project proof bar.
